title: Build a Flexbox Photo Gallery
description: A responsive photo gallery of nine cat images arranged with CSS flexbox. The gallery uses flex-wrap to flow images into multiple rows, object-fit: cover to fill each image slot without distortion, and a ::after pseudo-element to prevent the last row from stretching unevenly.
objectives: Use display: flex with flex-wrap: wrap to create a multi-row layout
Use justify-content: center to center items within the flex container
Use object-fit: cover to fill image containers without distortion
Use gap to add consistent spacing between flex items
Use ::after on the container to prevent uneven last-row stretching
